# Speech

d=&quot;M17 15a3.5 3.5 0 0 0-.025-4.975&quot;&gt;&lt;/path&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;" data-size="24" data-color="#000000" data-stroke="2"><div class="dioxus-icons-widget-header"><div class="a-s">&quot;#000000&quot;</span><span class="a-p">,</span><span> </span><span class="a-pr">stroke_width</span><span class="a-p">:</span><span> </span><span class="a-co">2</span><span> data-di-copy-label="true">Copy RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Speech;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Speech { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
disability, disabled, dda, human, accessibility, people, sound

## Categories
accessibility, communication

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/speech)
